title: zanthoxylum asiaticum
intro: Zanthoxylum asiaticum, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the rutaceae family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum asiaticum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and lower cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum asiaticum, such as tea, powder, and extract, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
